title: Section 130B
content: 1130B. Power of High Court or Supreme Court to require statement to be amended.--If the High Court or the Supreme Court is not satisfied that the statements in a case referred to it are sufficient to enable it to determine the questions raised thereby, the Court may refer the case back to the Appellate Tribunal for the purpose of making such additions thereto or alterations therein as it may direct in that behalf.
footnote: 1. Section 130B to be omitted by Act 49 of 2005, s. 30 (28-12-2005). This amendment has been struck down by the Supreme Court's order dated 25th September, 2014 in the Madras Bar Association Vs Union of India.
